title: Engineering
introduction_headline: Senior Software Technical Lead at Anduril
introduction: Hello, As a current Senior Tech Lead at Anduril and former Software Engineering Manager for Boeing’s Space Launch System, I specialize in the design, development, test and evaluation lifecycle of mathematical algorithms (such as vehicle simulations, sensor models and sensor fusion algorithms) in C++, MATLAB and Python. My goal is to deliver rigorous, bug-free, time and memory optimized code that can be used without errors for decades. I hold a B.S. in Applied Mathematics and captained Purdue’s 2009 ACM-ICPC World Finals programming team.
